subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down the Book and sent forth Him Whom He hath chosen before the creation of earth and heaven, and made Him manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الکتاب و ارسل من اصطفاه قبل خلق الارض و السماء و اظهره
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @consolation and comfort, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @praise and encouragement, @business; financial; property matters, @goodly deeds; actions
